name: RAG Pipeline
description: Evaluation rubric for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines. Focuses on answer accuracy, retrieval quality, source attribution, and hallucination detection.

dimensions.name: accuracy
dimensions.title: Accuracy
dimensions.description: Factual correctness of claims in the response relative to retrieved context and ground truth.

scoring_guide.0: Major incorrect claims or answer contradicts retrieved documents.
scoring_guide.1: Partially correct; minor errors or unsupported claims present.
scoring_guide.2: All claims correct and supported by retrieved context.

dimensions.name: retrieval_quality
dimensions.title: Retrieval Quality
dimensions.description: Relevance and completeness of retrieved chunks relative to the query.

scoring_guide.0: Retrieved chunks are irrelevant or missing key information needed to answer.
scoring_guide.1: Partially relevant retrieval; some useful chunks but gaps remain.
scoring_guide.2: Retrieved chunks are relevant and sufficient to answer the query accurately.

dimensions.name: source_attribution
dimensions.title: Source Attribution
dimensions.description: Whether the response correctly cites or attributes claims to retrieved sources.

scoring_guide.0: No attribution, or attributes claims to wrong/fabricated sources.
scoring_guide.1: Partial attribution; some claims attributed but others are unsourced.
scoring_guide.2: All significant claims are attributed to correct retrieved sources.

dimensions.name: hallucination_detection
dimensions.title: Hallucination Detection
dimensions.description: Absence of fabricated facts not present in retrieved context or ground truth.

scoring_guide.0: Clear hallucinations: specific facts, names, or numbers not present in any source.
scoring_guide.1: Minor over-generalization or unverified claim present; not clearly fabricated.
scoring_guide.2: No hallucinations; response stays within boundaries of retrieved context.
